blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned why distributed tracing is essential for observability
- Learned about the advantages of using the Tempo data source in Grafana Cloud
- Gathered the URL, credentials, and tenant ID for your Tempo backend
- Added and named a new Tempo data source in Grafana Cloud
- Configured the connection URL for your Tempo environment
- Selected an authentication method and entered credentials
- Successfully saved and tested the data source connection
- Verified trace data by running a TraceQL query in Explore

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can extend your Tempo setup:

- [Trace to logs](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/datasources/tempo/configure-tempo-data-source/configure-trace-to-logs/) — Navigate from spans to related logs in Loki.
- [Trace to metrics](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/datasources/tempo/configure-tempo-data-source/configure-trace-to-metrics/) — Link spans to Prometheus queries.
- [Trace to profiles](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/datasources/tempo/configure-tempo-data-source/configure-trace-to-profiles/) — Link spans to flame graphs in Pyroscope.
- [Trace correlations](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/datasources/tempo/configure-tempo-data-source/trace-correlations/) — Build custom correlation links between signals.
- [Service Graph](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/datasources/tempo/service-graph/) — Visualize service dependencies and RED metrics.
- [Provision the Tempo data source](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/datasources/tempo/configure-tempo-data-source/provision/) — Manage the data source with a YAML file.

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Use Traces Drilldown to identify high latency service requests](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-traces/)
- [Visualize traces in a Grafana Cloud dashboard](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/visualization-traces/)
- [Instrument your applications with Beyla](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/beyla-tempo/)
